vision_profile.current_state: You are a beginner eager to start a career in IT support, with a basic understanding of computers but lacking formal training and structured problem-solving skills.
vision_profile.main_blocker: Your biggest obstacle is the lack of structured technical knowledge, hands-on experience with common IT issues, and professional troubleshooting methodologies.
vision_profile.top_motivation: You are motivated to help users, solve technical problems, and build a foundational career in the rapidly growing tech industry.

milestones.label: M01
milestones.o: You can confidently identify common IT issues, understand operating system basics, and apply fundamental troubleshooting steps.
milestones.identity_statement: You are laying the groundwork to become a reliable first point of contact for technical assistance.

project.title: Set Up & Troubleshoot a Basic Workstation
project.description: Configure a new virtual workstation for a remote employee, install essential software, and diagnose common setup issues like network connectivity or peripheral recognition.
project.deliverable: A detailed report outlining the setup steps, identified issues, troubleshooting process, and resolution for a simulated workstation environment.
seeded_errors: The AI-generated network configuration file has an incorrect subnet mask, preventing internet access.
A critical driver for the virtual printer is missing from the AI-provided installation script.

modules.title: Introduction to IT Support & OS Fundamentals
lessons: Role of a Technical Support Associate

science.desc: Describe your approach to handling a frustrated user who can't access their email.

modules.title: Troubleshooting Methodologies
lessons: The Troubleshooting Process (Identify, Theorize, Test, Plan, Implement, Verify, Document)

scenario.title: Applying Troubleshooting Steps to a Printer Issue
When to Escalate a Complex Issue

science.desc: A user reports slow system performance. Outline your diagnostic steps and potential solutions.

milestones.label: M02
milestones.o: You can install and configure common software, perform basic hardware diagnostics, and resolve peripheral issues.
milestones.identity_statement: You are becoming proficient in the practical aspects of maintaining user workstations and resolving common technical glitches.

project.title: Software Deployment & Hardware Upgrade Simulation
project.description: Plan and simulate the deployment of a new productivity suite across several virtual machines and diagnose a simulated RAM upgrade failure on a test system.
project.deliverable: A deployment plan, a troubleshooting log for the RAM issue, and a report on successful software installation.
seeded_errors: The AI-generated software deployment script fails due to incorrect dependency paths.
The AI-provided hardware compatibility matrix incorrectly lists an incompatible RAM module for the simulated system.

modules.title: Software Installation & Configuration
lessons: Installation Methods (MSI, Package Managers, Web Installers)

science.desc: Explain the difference between a 32-bit and 64-bit operating system and its implications for software installation.

modules.title: Hardware Diagnostics & Maintenance
lessons: Computer Components Overview (CPU, RAM, Storage, Motherboard)
Identifying Hardware Issues (Beep Codes, POST Errors)

scenario.title: Diagnosing a Computer That Won't Boot

science.desc: A user reports their mouse and keyboard are not working. What are your initial diagnostic steps?

milestones.label: M03
milestones.o: You can write basic scripts to automate repetitive tasks, manage files, and gather system information, significantly improving efficiency.
milestones.identity_statement: You are evolving into an efficient support professional, leveraging automation to streamline your work and solve problems faster.

project.title: Automated User Onboarding Script
project.description: Develop a Python script to automate parts of the user onboarding process, such as creating a user directory, setting permissions, and generating a welcome message.
project.deliverable: A functional Python script, documentation for its use, and a test report demonstrating its execution.
seeded_errors: The AI-generated script has a logical error where it attempts to create a directory that already exists without error handling.
The script's permission setting logic is flawed, granting excessive permissions to new user directories.

video.title: Reading and Writing Files with Python

skills.title: Python OS Module for System Interaction

video.title: Managing Files and Directories with OS Module

science.desc: How would you use a Python script to check if a service is running on a remote machine?

video.title: Automating Tasks with Cron and Task Scheduler
Connecting to Remote Systems with SSH and RDP

science.desc: A user needs to regularly transfer large files to a remote server. How would you automate this using scripting?

milestones.label: M04
milestones.o: You can diagnose complex network and system issues, analyze logs effectively, and implement basic monitoring solutions.
milestones.identity_statement: You are becoming a proactive problem-solver, capable of anticipating and mitigating issues before they impact users.

project.title: System Health Monitoring & Alerting
project.description: Design and implement a basic system health monitoring solution using scripting to check CPU, memory, disk usage, and network connectivity, sending alerts if thresholds are exceeded.
project.deliverable: A Python script for monitoring, configuration files for alerts, and a demonstration of the system generating an alert.
seeded_errors: The AI-generated monitoring script incorrectly calculates free disk space, leading to false alerts.
The alerting mechanism in the AI solution fails to send notifications due to an invalid SMTP server configuration.

modules.title: Advanced Network & System Diagnostics
lessons: Deep Dive into TCP/IP & Network Protocols

video.title: Introduction to Wireshark for Network Analysis

science.desc: How would you diagnose a user's complaint that their internet connection is 'slow'?

modules.title: Log Analysis & Monitoring Tools
lessons: Using Log Aggregation Tools (ELK Stack Introduction)
Monitoring System Health (CPU, Memory, Disk, Network)
Introduction to SNMP for Network Monitoring

scenario.title: Identifying a Recurring Application Error from Logs

video.title: Introduction to Monitoring CPU, Memory, and Disk

milestones.label: M05
milestones.o: You can provide basic support for cloud-based services, troubleshoot virtual machine issues, and understand cloud infrastructure fundamentals.
milestones.identity_statement: You are expanding your expertise into modern cloud environments, becoming a valuable asset in a hybrid IT landscape.

project.title: Cloud VM Provisioning & Basic Troubleshooting
project.description: Provision a basic virtual machine in a simulated cloud environment (e.g., AWS EC2 or Azure VM), install a web server, and troubleshoot common connectivity or service startup issues.
project.deliverable: A cloud provisioning script (e.g., Terraform/CloudFormation snippet), a troubleshooting log, and proof of web server accessibility.
seeded_errors: The AI-generated cloud provisioning script has an incorrect security group configuration, blocking web traffic.
The web server installation script provided by AI has a syntax error, preventing the service from starting.

modules.title: Cloud Fundamentals & Virtualization
lessons: Introduction to Cloud Computing (IaaS, PaaS, SaaS)
Key Cloud Providers (AWS, Azure, GCP Overview)
Virtual Machines in the Cloud (EC2, Azure VMs)

scenario.title: Choosing the Right Cloud Service Model
Troubleshooting a VM That Won't Start
Resolving a Cloud Network Access Issue

science.desc: Explain the shared responsibility model in cloud computing and its implications for a support role.

modules.title: Basic Cloud Service Troubleshooting
lessons: Troubleshooting Web Server Issues on Cloud VMs
Database Service Basics (RDS, Azure SQL Database)

scenario.title: A Web Server on a Cloud VM is Unreachable
Investigating High CPU Usage on a Cloud Instance

video.title: Introduction to AWS Lambda and Azure Functions

scenario.title: Debugging a Failed Serverless Function Execution

science.desc: A user reports they cannot access a file stored in cloud storage. What steps would you take to troubleshoot this?

milestones.label: M06
milestones.o: You can identify common security threats, implement basic data protection measures, and assist with incident response procedures.
milestones.identity_statement: You are becoming a vigilant guardian of digital assets, ensuring the safety and integrity of user data and systems.

project.title: Security Audit & Data Backup Plan
project.description: Conduct a basic security audit of a simulated system, identify vulnerabilities, and propose a data backup and recovery plan for critical user data.
project.deliverable: A security audit report with identified vulnerabilities, a recommended data backup strategy, and a simple script for automated local backups.
seeded_errors: The AI-generated security audit report misses a critical open port vulnerability.
The AI-proposed backup plan uses an insecure storage location for sensitive data.

modules.title: Cybersecurity Fundamentals for Support
lessons: Introduction to Cybersecurity Threats (Malware, Phishing, Ransomware)
Basic Security Best Practices (Strong Passwords, MFA)

video.title: Identifying and Mitigating Common Cyber Threats

scenario.title: Blocking Malicious Traffic with Firewall Rules

video.title: Steps in a Security Incident Response

science.desc: A user reports suspicious activity on their account. What are your immediate steps?

video.title: Implementing Full, Incremental, and Differential Backups

scenario.title: Designing a Backup Plan for Critical Data
Recovering Lost Files from a Corrupted Drive
Developing a Basic DR Plan for a Small Office

milestones.label: M07
milestones.o: You excel in customer communication, manage incidents effectively, and contribute to knowledge base development, preparing you for leadership roles.
milestones.identity_statement: You are a trusted advisor and a leader in customer satisfaction, driving positive user experiences and efficient problem resolution.

project.title: Knowledge Base Article & Incident Report
project.description: Create a comprehensive knowledge base article for a common technical issue and write a detailed incident report for a simulated critical outage.
project.deliverable: A well-structured knowledge base article, a formal incident report, and a presentation on effective communication strategies during outages.
seeded_errors: The AI-generated knowledge base article contains outdated troubleshooting steps.
The AI-provided incident report template omits critical sections for root cause analysis and future prevention.

scenario.title: Handling an Upset Customer with a Critical Issue

video.title: Writing Clear and Effective KB Articles

scenario.title: Structuring a Troubleshooting Guide for a Complex Issue
Implementing Changes Based on User Feedback

science.desc: How do you handle a situation where you don't know the answer to a user's technical question?
A critical business application is down. Outline your incident management steps from detection to resolution and post-mortem.
